channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Sysco Announces $29 Billion Jetro Restaurant Depot Acquisition
item.description:
Sysco has agreed to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot in a $29 billion deal that would unite the two largest players in U.S. foodservice distribution under a single corporate roof.

Key points:
• The $29.1 billion deal — the largest in Sysco's history — combines cash and stock, with Jetro shareholders receiving $21.6 billion in cash and 91.5 million Sysco shares, giving them a roughly 16% stake in the combined company.
• Jetro Restaurant Depot operates 166 large-format warehouse stores across 35 states, generating $16 billion in annual revenue through its members-only, cash-and-carry model serving independent restaurants and small food businesses.
• Sysco plans to fund the acquisition primarily through $21 billion in new debt, and expects the deal to be earnings-accretive in the mid- to high-single digits in the first full year after closing, targeted for Q3 of Sysco's fiscal 2027.
• Sysco shares fell over 12% on the news as investors reacted to the heavy debt load, though the company projects roughly $250 million in annual cost synergies within three years and will suspend share buybacks while maintaining its dividend.

Read the full article: Sysco Announces $29 Billion Jetro Restaurant Depot Acquisition

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
